title: No validation of roaming impact on propagation
description: After first chunk, nodes are added but no movement simulation or checks for how position changes affect announce reception or connectivity (critical for conference roaming). Should add nodes moving in/out of conference_area and verify received counts change. P1. Codereview pass #2.
close_reason: Verified: roaming propagation impact covered by position-based tests in python/tests/sim/test_topology_change.py, test_topology_scenarios.py, test_propagation.py and updated test_scale.py from prior helb/ck81 work (dynamic SCALE_NODES, enter/leave simulation, metrics for announce/RPL). All codereview findings resolved. No code changes needed.
